title: Hamsters
text: Home * Engines * Hamsters Hamster Egbert [1] Hamsters , an UCI compliant multi-hamster chess engine by Alessandro Scotti with the goal of a program that has a full-featured and correct implementation of the UCI protocol, and that is able to play standard chess as well as Chess960 . It applies a parallel search utilizing up to 8 threads . Binaries are available for Windows and Mac OS X [2] . Hamsters played the CIPS 2007 , and was runner-up behind Delfi at the CCC 2008 .
